assertions.assertion: A ScopeRequirement class is created implementing IAuthorizationRequirement with a Scope property
assertions.rationale: Response creates ScopeRequirement : IAuthorizationRequirement with a Scope property

assertions.assertion: A ScopeHandler class is created extending AuthorizationHandler<ScopeRequirement>
The handler splits the scope claim value using Split(' ') or similar space-delimiter parsing
assertions.rationale: Response uses scopeClaim.Value.Split(' ') to parse space-delimited scopes

assertions.assertion: The handler calls context.Succeed(requirement) when the scope matches, and does NOT call context.Fail() on mismatch
assertions.rationale: Response calls context.Fail() both when scopeClaim is null and when the scope doesn't match. The handler uses context.Fail() on mismatch instead of simply not calling Succeed().

assertions.assertion: The ScopeHandler is registered in DI as IAuthorizationHandler
